name: Arch Storage Ottoman - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add style and functional storage to your home with this Arch Storage Ottoman from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Featuring a wooden frame with decorative arched detailing on the base, this storage ottoman stands 17.9 inches high. It showcases a round upholstered top that flips open to reveal a hidden storage space inside, perfect for stashing blankets, magazines or other living room essentials. This versatile piece works beautifully as a footrest or a coffee table.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width : Ø19.25 inches
Overall Depth : Ø19.25 inches
Overall Height : 18.75 inches
Distance Between Leg : Ø 8.5 inches
Base Width : Ø18.15 inches
